title: sksync agent target mapping
description: Global and project-scope agent target directory overrides for sksync.

global.description: Global/user-scope agent target directory mappings keyed by agent name.

project.description: Project-scope agent target directory mappings shared by all projects.

targetDir.description: Directory where the agent reads skills. Tilde-prefixed paths are supported by sksync. Relative project-scope paths resolve from the project root.
